providers.name: Kabi Kazi Nazrul Islam Hall Canteen
providers.location: Kabi Kazi Nazrul Islam Hall, Ground Floor
providers.description: The most popular hall canteen, known for its exceptional beef curry and friendly service. A students' favorite!

providers.name: Dr. Qudrat-E-Khuda Hall Canteen
providers.description: Serving fresh breakfast, lunch and dinner for QK Hall residents. Known for authentic Bengali cuisine and quick service.

providers.name: Shaheed Mohammad Shah Hall Canteen
providers.location: Shaheed Mohammad Shah Hall, Ground Floor
providers.description: Popular canteen offering diverse menu options including biryani, tehari, and daily specials at affordable prices.

providers.name: Shaheed Tareq Huda Hall Canteen
providers.location: Shaheed Tareq Huda Hall, Ground Floor
providers.description: Cozy canteen with excellent rice dishes and snacks. Perfect spot for evening tea and light refreshments.

providers.name: Muktijoddha Hall Canteen
providers.description: Traditional canteen serving homemade-style meals. Specializes in fish curry and local favorites.

providers.name: Sufia Kamal Hall Canteen
providers.description: Clean and spacious canteen offering fresh meals, snacks, and beverages. Popular for its hygienic environment.

providers.name: Central Cafeteria
providers.description: Modern cafeteria with wide variety of fast food, beverages, and desserts. Air-conditioned seating available.

providers.name: Tareq Mama's Food Cart
providers.description: Famous street food cart known for delicious fuchka, chotpoti, and evening snacks. Quick and budget-friendly.
